strict_parity_rule: No invented survival progression; the only requested new behavior is bound to the existing original TC4 thaumonomiconcheat item mirror as a creative/debug adapter.

user_requested_full_research_book.source: existing TC4ResearchItems mirror of ConfigItems.itemThaumonomicon cheat sprite
user_requested_full_research_book.behavior: right-click grants every ResearchRegistry key, applies original warp side effects only for newly unlocked entries, syncs research and aspect knowledge

parity_assessment.mechanics: partial; wands/foci/aura/nodes/crucible/infusion/research/golems/eldritch/taint exist as staged adapters, but many are not exact TC4 source-parity yet
parity_assessment.textures: partial but improving; many original GUI/model/item assets are present and mirrored, remaining block/entity/UV/model transforms need full per-asset audit
parity_assessment.gui: partial; Thaumonomicon, Research Table, Arcane Workbench, HUD use original assets, but pixel-coordinate/interaction parity is still incomplete
parity_assessment.infusion_matrix: functional staged craft path exists: wand activation, catalyst, ordered components, essentia drain, research gate, output; still missing full TC4 instability/failure/FX/enchantment edge cases and complete ConfigRecipes coverage
parity_assessment.recipes: partial; recipe materialization and gates exist, but full ConfigRecipes parity is not complete
parity_assessment.worldgen_taint_eldritch: partial; structures/entities/adapters exist, still not exact TC4 world/runtime behavior

known_high_priority_gaps: Research Table: exact original GUI coordinates, note interaction, aspect solving, copy behavior and sounds still need deep parity.
Arcane Workbench: exact slots, vis discount, wand inventory behavior and recipe preview still need further parity.
Aura Node: renderer/HUD use original atlases but node behavior, type/modifier visuals, scanning and GUI overlay still need exact matching.
Thaumometer/Goggles/Wands: original textures/models are present, but transforms/UV/geometry are not fully pixel/model parity.
Infusion Matrix: full original ConfigRecipes, instability events, symmetry checks, particles/sounds, enchantment index and failure modes remain incomplete.
Foci: all original upgrade effects must be cross-checked against ItemFocusBasic/Fire/Frost/Shock/Excavation/Trade/PortableHole/Warding/Primal and projectile classes.
Duplicate/mirror cleanup: tc4_* mirror items must remain quarantined or replaced by real active classes as source parity is implemented.
next_stage_focus: full parity audit expansion; exact Research Table/Arcane Workbench behavior; Infusion Matrix recipes/failure FX; Aura Node GUI/HUD; wand/focus source parity cleanup
